emails.subject: Budget
emails.body: Budget Louise, I understand that you will shortly receive a first draft budget submission for ENA. I'm not sure what format you'll receive it in, but if its the standard format, it'll be difficult to pick out the project level estimates. I have access to the team/project level estimates, and would be happy to pull together a quick view that suits you. I was going to try to guess how you would like to see it, but I thought I'd better ask you first, ....it'll probably save me a lot of work! The thought was to give you a quick handle on whats "essential-keep the business running" stuff, and what would be great but we can struggle on without. Please remember this is supposed to be a quick heads-up, and not intended to replace any full explanation that will innevitably follow later. Some alternatives (obviously, feel free to suggest your own) 1. Capital Team Project 1 Name Description ENA Project 2 Name Description ENA Expense Project 1 Name Description ENA Project 2 Name Description ENA 2. Capital Team Essential Nice to Have Project 1 Name Description ENA 40% 60% Project 2 Name Description ENA 80% 20% Expense Project 1 Name Description ENA Project 2 Name Description ENA Please let me know what you would prefer, and I'll try to get you the view by the end of the day. regards Steve

emails.subject: RE: Budget
emails.body: RE: Budget I was sort of assuming Sally would bring this with her to the meeting. Am I wrong? To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: Budget
emails.body: I will thanks To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: Budget
emails.body: Budget Louise, I've seen a list where you nominate a set of business sponsors to represent NA interests, and it appears that the intention is to have single points of contact for each of the budget buckets. However, there are a number of horizontal initiatives, such as Global Data, that cut across all of them. Is it your intention that we take the horizontals to all the people listed, or will you nominate one to evaluate the budget numbers? regards Steve

emails.subject: RE: Budget
emails.body: RE: Budget Those guys will do the full horizontals too wherever possible I'll do the others To: Kitchen, Louise
